title: The Binding Of Isaac like hearts
description: This resource pack make hearts the Binding of Isaac hearts.
body:
This pack retexture 4 hearts to TBOI hearts. Here is the list

1- Normal Hearts - Normal Hearts

2- Gapple Hearts - Soul Hearts

3- Poisoned Hearts - Rotten Hearts

4- Wither Hearts - Black Hearts

5- Hardcore Mode special golden outline

and last thing i say is thats my first resource pack and im Turk. If u guys think thats bad resource pack thats my fault :d.
